title: Cruise passengers tell of life on board stranded ship after hantavirus outbreak
snippet: While passengers onboard the MV Hondius say the situation is calm, they face days at sea as officials warn the disease may have spread.

title: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
snippet: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.

title: The companies making billions from the Iran war
snippet: Through surging profits or soaring share prices, the war has been a boon for some firms.

title: Massive Alaska megatsunami was second largest ever recorded
snippet: New research suggests glacier melt driven by climate change is increasing the risk of giant waves.

title: Watch: Drone delivers first Amazon parcels in UK
snippet: The tech giant says it hopes to slowly expand the service as the demand for ultra-fast deliveries grows.

title: TikTok scales back AI-generated video descriptions after absurd errors
snippet: While only rolled out to some users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.

title: Trump says Russia and Ukraine to observe three-day ceasefire
snippet: It comes as the two countries accused each other of violating separate ceasefires to cover the celebrations of the Soviet Union's victory over Nazi Germany.

title: Iran accuses US of 'reckless military adventure'
snippet: Abbas Araghchi says the US attacks each time there is a diplomatic solution on the table.

title: Hovering objects and flashing lights: what we learned from UFO documents released by the Pentagon
snippet: The US has published transcripts, video clips and audio recordings about unidentified flying objects, also called unidentified anomalous phenomena.

title: Global forest loss slows but El Niño fires could threaten progress
snippet: The loss of tropical rainforests eased last year, according to new analysis, but scientists warn they are still disappearing rapidly.

title: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees
snippet: Meta said Ofcom's calculations were "disproportionate"; the regulator said it would defend its position.

title: How worried should we be about hantavirus?
snippet: Some passengers potentially exposed to hantavirus have already taken flights to numerous countries.

title: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship on way to Canary Islands after three evacuated
snippet: A British man is among three evacuees sent to the Netherlands after displaying symptoms while aboard the MV Hondius.

title: South East Water boss quits after supply failures
snippet: David Hinton faced criticism after outages affected tens of thousands of people in Kent and Sussex.

title: Anger and resignation in Tenerife as hantavirus ship approaches
snippet: Some on the Spanish island worry that the imminent arrival of the MV Hondius could pose a health risk.
